title: cleistocactus baumannii subsp. baumannii
intro: Cleistocactus baumannii subsp. baumannii, also known as the Baumann's Ball Cactus, is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae, native to Bolivia. The plant has medicinal properties, particularly its stems and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine for centuries to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Cleistocactus baumannii subsp. baumannii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain, heal wounds, and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which can be applied topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
